text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Each day was jam-packed with activity, yet
somehow it feels like summer camp went by in the
blink of an eye.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: C'mon, Grass! Race ya to the BUUUS!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yes, yes, I'm on my way!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
What in the heavens has gotten into her? She's
been pestering me so much lately.
choice_data_list: Maybe she's excited for the upcoming race.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I suppose that's fair. While you may not see me
hollering wildly about the flames of passion...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
...I too have no intention of surrendering the lead
to anyone.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Not until I reach the destination I seek.
